description: This file defines the OutageListScreen widget and related internal widgets for displaying a list of outages with details, styled using Flutter. It manages rendering outage items, their status, and associated metadata, integrating with application state and navigation.

classes.name: OutageListScreen
classes.description: A widget that displays a list of outages with a loading indicator and a header hint card.

classes.name: _OutageCard
classes.description: A widget representing individual outage information, including title, location, status, ETA, report time, and tap handling.

classes.name: _StatusChip
classes.description: A widget for displaying the outage status as a styled chip with appropriate color based on status.

classes.name: _MetaPill
classes.description: A small UI element showing icons and metadata related to outages.

classes.name: _HintCard
classes.description: A UI card providing a user hint about real-time updates for outages.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the OutageListScreen, watching outages data and rendering the list or loading indicator.

methods.name: _OutageCard.build
methods.description: Builds the visual representation for an outage entry, including time, title, location, and metadata.

methods.name: _StatusChip.build
methods.description: Builds a colored chip widget based on outage status.

methods.name: _MetaPill.build
methods.description: Builds a small pill-shaped widget with icon and text.

methods.name: _HintCard.build
methods.description: Builds a hint card with icon and instructional text.
